case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VERONICA MARIE FLEMING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED SEP-30-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, VERONICA MARIE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, VERONICA MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VERONICA MARIE FLEMING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLEMING, VERONICA MARIE $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FLEMING, VERONICA MARIE
